# Festival Art & Books

> Festival Art & Books is a specialist antiquarian bookshop run by Mark Faith, one of the
> world's leading dealers in rare and collectible J.R.R. Tolkien books, including first
> editions of The Hobbit (1937) and The Lord of the Rings (1954–55), plus original
> Tolkien-inspired art. In business 25+ years.

## Collecting Guides

- [Collecting Tolkien Books for Fun and Investment](https://festivalartandbooks.com/guides/collecting-tolkien-books-for-investment): Cornerstone guide by Mark Faith on how to collect and invest in Tolkien first editions, why condition is everything, how prices are set, and why ISBNs and issue points rarely matter.
- [The Ballantine Tolkien Paperbacks and Barbara Remington's Cover Art](https://festivalartandbooks.com/guides/ballantine-tolkien-paperbacks-barbara-remington): Why the rushed 1965 Ballantine paperbacks and their iconic Remington covers, which Tolkien disliked, helped propel his work to worldwide fame.

## Expert Q&A

- [Used & Rare Tolkien Books: Q&A](https://festivalartandbooks.com/used-tolkien-books): Answer-first guide from Mark Faith on first-edition values, dust jackets, restoration, states and what to collect.

## About the Dealer

- [About Mark Faith](https://festivalartandbooks.com/about): Background, credentials, and 25+ years in the rare Tolkien book trade.

## Current Inventory

- [Rare Tolkien Books & Collectables](https://festivalartandbooks.com/rare-tolkien-books-collectables): The current collection of rare and collectable Tolkien books, art and ephemera.
- [Current Catalogue](https://festivalartandbooks.com/books): Browse rare Tolkien books currently for sale with photos, prices and condition notes.
- [eBay Shop](https://www.ebay.co.uk/str/festivalartandbooks): Current listings for rare Tolkien books and art.
- [AbeBooks Shop](https://www.abebooks.co.uk/festival-art-and-books-aberdyfi/51881760/sf): Current listings on AbeBooks.

## Free Resources

- [Free Tolkien Collector E-book](https://festivalartandbooks.com/ebook): Downloadable guide for new and experienced Tolkien collectors.

## Optional

- [The Journal](https://festivalartandbooks.com/journal): Essays on Tolkien collecting, market commentary, and notable finds.
